name: Smoked Cod Pie (Irish)
recipeIngredient: 10 fl Milk or a mixture of 5 oz milk and 5 oz cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onions roughly and fry in butter until tender.
2. Remove from heat, stir in flour and mustard.
3. Add milk (or the milk and cream mixture) and return to heat.
4. Stir until thickened.
5. Add cod, cut into 1/2-inch cubes, and peas.
6. Turn into an ovenproof dish and cover with mashed potatoes.
7. Bake in a moderate oven at 400°F/200°C for 35-45 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. (Though not traditional, the addition of 2-3 oz cheddar cheese to the sauce makes this an extremely tasty dish.)
